Title: Document Ingestion and Processing
Description: Use custom parsing workflow for RAG corpus preparation
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Review source document structure. 2. Parse supported documents. 3. Extract sections and metadata. 4. Capture anchors and image references. 5. Chunk content for retrieval. 6. Prepare normalized ingestion output.
Comments: Assumes supported source formats and agreed corpus location

Title: Embedding and Vector Store Configuration
Description: Use OCI Generative AI and Oracle AI Database for vector indexing
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Configure embedding model access. 2. Create vector schema. 3. Generate text embeddings. 4. Load vectors into database. 5. Validate retrieval quality. 6. Support full index rebuild.
Comments: Requires OCI GenAI access Oracle AI Database access and wallet configuration

Title: Retrieval and Prompt Construction
Description: Use retrieval orchestration to prepare grounded model input
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Embed user query. 2. Retrieve top candidate chunks. 3. Apply lexical reranking. 4. Build grounded prompt. 5. Add source references. 6. Prepare model-ready context package.
Comments: Prompt style and answer expectations should be agreed

Title: GenAI Chat Service
Description: Use OCI chat models to generate grounded responses
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Configure chat model integration. 2. Send grounded prompt to model. 3. Parse model response. 4. Handle insufficient-context cases. 5. Return cited answer. 6. Expose service through API.
Comments: Requires OCI credentials model access and connectivity

Title: React User Interface
Description: Use React to build the end-user chat experience
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Build chat interface. 2. Integrate frontend with APIs. 3. Display responses and sources. 4. Show retrieved evidence. 5. Add status and rebuild controls. 6. Support reset conversation behavior.
Comments: Enterprise branding SSO and custom UX flows are excluded unless added

Title: Multimodal Search
Description: Use image embeddings and vision model support for image-assisted queries
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Enable image upload. 2. Prepare image payload. 3. Generate image embeddings. 4. Retrieve similar indexed images. 5. Invoke vision model path. 6. Display returned image matches.
Comments: Subject to supported image formats and model availability

Title: API and Service Layer
Description: Use FastAPI to expose application services
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Implement health endpoint. 2. Implement status endpoint. 3. Implement ingestion trigger endpoint. 4. Implement chat endpoint. 5. Add request and response models. 6. Handle validation and errors.

Title: Security and Access Setup
Description: Configure secure access for OCI and application components
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Review IAM setup. 2. Configure least-privilege access. 3. Secure secrets and runtime config. 4. Validate network access. 5. Review endpoint exposure. 6. Perform basic security checks.
Comments: Customer must provide tenancy access approvals and network details

Title: Deployment and Environment Setup
Description: Prepare the application for target environment deployment
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Configure environment settings. 2. Build frontend artifacts. 3. Configure runtime startup. 4. Validate connectivity. 5. Perform smoke testing. 6. Support deployment handoff.
Comments: Separate environments may require additional effort

Title: Testing and Validation
Description: Validate functional behavior and response quality
Included Activities (Tasks to be perform: 1. Prepare test queries. 2. Validate ingestion. 3. Verify retrieval relevance. 4. Tune prompts and chunking. 5. Test error scenarios. 6. Document findings and recommendations.
Comments: Requires SME participation for business validation

Title: Total
Comments: Sum of estimated effort across listed line items
